purpose: Public-safe ledger for recovered FNV VR hands, Pip-Boy, pointer, wrist HUD, and retail sidecar anchors. This file records provenance and acceptance notes only; it does not contain or point to distributable game assets.
localArtifactsPolicy: Keep source snapshots, proof JSON, extracted meshes, screenshots, and copied configs in ignored local quarantine storage.

verdict.nativeOpenmwVrHands: Recovered. The proven baseline is commit 5266335943; the latest clean source snapshot found during recovery was commit 7cf9e6806a.
verdict.retailFnvxrBridge: Recovered from a local working tree as a separate sidecar layer. Keep it separate from native OpenMW VR until the world viewer shell is stable.
verdict.eppSearch: No literal .epp or EPP markers were found in the targeted recovery search. The preserved anchors are source, configs, and proof JSONs.

sourceSnapshots.description: Clean branch snapshot with native OpenMW VR hand, Pip-Boy, pointer, and HUD source paths.
Proven baseline: Stabilize FNV VR hands pointer and wrist HUD.
Dirty working tree copy of FNVXR sidecar source/docs/scripts/tests/tools, excluding build/deps/local/runtime assets.

configs.notes: Authoritative no-rebuild launcher profile for the existing OpenMW VR binary and FNV config.
Includes VR hand mesh offsets, map/HUD settings, preload, terrain, and FNV world-viewer settings.
Existing FNV OpenMW content/archive/profile config copied locally for reference only.

guardrails: Prefer an existing external OpenMW VR binary before starting a full compile.
Do not publish or commit extracted retail meshes/textures from the FNV install.
Keep OpenMW VR native hand/Pip-Boy rendering and the FNVXR retail sidecar as separate layers until the world viewer menu is stable.
